title: Zooming Web Pages
drDigitalIntro: Some websites are hard to read if the text is tiny. You can zoom in with Command+Plus or zoom out with Command+Minus. You can also pinch on the trackpad to zoom. Press Command+0 to return to normal size. Each website remembers your zoom level — when you return, it's zoomed how you like it.

playgroundTask.question: Which keyboard shortcut makes text bigger on a webpage?

drDigitalSuccess: Command + Plus zooms in. Command + Minus zooms out. Command + 0 resets to normal.
drDigitalHint: + means bigger, - means smaller. That's all there is to it.
